text.title: CR Options Matrix Template — Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every application of CR Options Matrix Template must enforce.

rule.statement: Enumerate ≥2 viable options (accept / reduce / defer / re-baseline). No single-option theatre.
rule.rationale: Single-option matrices are decoration; the matrix exists to compare.

rule.statement: Each option scores cost / value / risk on a defined rubric.
rule.rationale: Without a rubric, scoring is opinion and apples-to-oranges.

rule.statement: The matrix names a single approver and a decision-by date.
The matrix names a recommendation backed by trade-off rationale referencing the scores.
rule.rationale: Recommendations without rationale invite hindsight challenge.

rule.statement: Options MUST be genuinely viable; straw-men options are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Straw-men collapse the matrix into single-option theatre with extra steps.
